sizes.label: Registered sizes
sizes.description: Built-in and custom image sizes available to WordPress.
sizes.deleteDescription: Custom sizes are removed from Onumia settings. Built-in overrides are cleared instead of deleting WordPress-owned sizes.
sizes.drawerCreateDescription: Create a custom image size registered with add_image_size().
sizes.drawerEditDescription: Adjust the selected image size definition.

regenerate.label: Bulk regenerate
regenerate.description: Queue attachment derivatives for selected image sizes.
regenerate.statusDescription: Current queue state recorded in module settings.

log.label: Regeneration log
log.drawerDescription: Inspect the regeneration result for this attachment and size.
